description_long: This combat tactical vehicle is a futuristic, heavily-armored aircraft with a broad, angular body and a distinctive twin-engine configuration mounted on each wing. The exterior is covered in a digital camouflage pattern of green, black, and gray, providing visual disruption. The vehicle features a robust, reinforced hull with visible armor plating, especially around the cockpit and engine nacelles. Several weapon mounts are present on the top and underside, including turret-like structures and hardpoints for additional armaments. The rear section is wide and flat, possibly for cargo or troop deployment, and the landing gear is partially visible beneath the fuselage. Military insignia and markings are present on the sides, adding to its tactical appearance.
description: A futuristic, heavily-armored combat aircraft with digital camouflage, twin engines, and multiple weapon mounts. Its angular design and reinforced hull suggest advanced tactical capabilities.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular body, digital camouflage, and visible military insignia on the fuselage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide tail section, twin engines, and flat cargo area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, including visible weapon mounts and armor plating.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cockpit, reinforced nose, and prominent weapon mounts above and below the fuselage.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible weapon mounts: two turret-like mounts on the top front, one under the nose, and one on the rear upper fuselage.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with reinforced sections around the cockpit, engines, and lower fuselage; armor appears thick and angular with sloped surfaces.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in green, black, and gray with irregular, pixelated shapes.
attribute_military_markings: White insignia with a star and circle on both sides of the fuselage near the cockpit.
